headline:
CEO at Doohclick AB: a definitive ad management platform for 
the out of home space.
summary:
DoohClick is a OOH management platform. Built from the ground up by OOH media owners for OOH owners and operators, it serves both classic and digital formats.

A fully independent company founded in Sweden, we’re focused on creating new business opportunities and updating legacy OOH systems globally.

What we do:

→ Programmatic improved analysis
→ Complete sales support
→ Dynamic scheduling
→ Fast reporting

Ready to be part of the next generation of OOH? Let’s chat.

experiences.title: CEO
experiences.description: DoohClick is a Swedish based company which develops and provides out of home ad serving ecosystems. Its clients included media owners, screen owners, landlords, agencies, marketers and publishers who served businesses like Spotify, Samsung, Coca cola, Uber, Volvo, Huawei.

experiences.title: Partner
experiences.description: DirtChampDesign provides the RC car industry with easy to use, state-of-the-art and affordable RC lap timing / RC lap counter products.

experiences.title: COO / Partner
experiences.description: Media Digital Signage Creative Production www.adcitymedia.com

experiences.title: Marketing Manager
experiences.description: Sidewalk Express AB operates a chain of Internet points in Northern Europe. Its Internet points are situated in airports, railway stations, shopping malls, cafes, and convenience stores. The company offers advertising packages with online and offline exposure to provide the advertiser with various ways to reach out with its message. It operates in Sweden, Norway, Denmark, and Germany. The company was founded in 2001 and is based in Stockholm, Sweden with sales offices in Germany.

experiences.title: Solutions Manager Trainee
experiences.description: Hansoft is an integrated solution for agile and lean development, collaborative scheduling, real-time reporting, bug tracking / QA, workload coordination, portfolio and document management, used by the most demanding software developers in more than 20 countries. The tool is fast and easy and builds on principles of team empowerment, increased communication, transparency, and collaboration.
